name: Attorney Fees for Chemical Exposure Claims in Murray

mainEntity.name: How much does a chemical exposure lawyer cost in Murray, Utah?
mainEntity.text: How much does a chemical exposure lawyer cost in Murray, Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contingency: 20% of benefits if under $35k, 15-20% over; no win, no fee in Murray chemical claims.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah mandates attorney fees from awards only. Murray firms like Just Work Comp charge 20% max, recovering more overall. Avoid pro se—low settlements common. Free consults assess viability; compare local rates for toxics expertise.
